page_metadata.biotools__summary: Fully automated service for functional annotation of prokaryotic and eukaryotic proteins of unknown function. The tool is designed to predict the functional description (DE), EC numbers and GO classes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Fully automated service for functional annotation of prokaryotic and eukaryotic proteins of unknown function. The tool is designed to predict the functional description (DE), EC numbers and GO classes.
